subject: [PATCH v2 01/21] nfsd: clear opcnt on compound arg release to prevent OOB read

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server where stale compound metadata could be exposed to userspace through the status interface. The problem occurred when an error path was taken after setting the operation count (opcnt) to an odd value, causing an out-of-bounds read from adjacent slab memory. To fix this, the patch clears the opcnt field unconditionally in nfsd4_release_compoundargs().
